name: Fricot a La "Belette" ("Weasel" Fricot/soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion in butter until golden brown.
2. Add salted herbs and onions to the pot with butter.
3. Add water, potatoes, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
5. To thicken, mix flour with cold water to form a dough, roll out thinly, cut into squares, and place in the fricot.
6. Cover and simmer for an additional 7 minutes.
Note: Salted herbs can be made by mixing salt with chopped herbs like parsley or chives.
